Uses of Interface
common.binary.BinaryInput

  • Packages that use BinaryInput 
    Package Description
    common.binary  
    heif
    Provides high-level classes for parsing and manipulating HEIF-based files.
    heif.boxes
    Classes for parsing and representing individual HEIF-structured boxes.
    jpg
    Classes for parsing and manipulating JPEG-based files are found here.
    png
    Functionality for parsing and processing PNG image files is provided here.
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
    webp  

    • Uses of BinaryInput in common.binary

      Classes in common.binary that implement BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  ByteArrayReader
      Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
      class  ByteArrayReaderOld
      Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
      class  RandomAccessReader
      A seekable binary reader backed by a RandomAccessFile.

    • Uses of BinaryInput in heif

      Fields in heif declared as BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private BinaryInput BoxHandler.reader 
      Methods in heif with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Box BoxFactory.createBox(BinaryInput reader) 
      static java.lang.String BoxFactory.peekBoxType(BinaryInput reader) 

    • Uses of BinaryInput in heif.boxes

      Methods in heif.boxes with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long Box.available(BinaryInput reader)
      Returns the number of remaining bytes in the box.
      private long ItemLocationBox.readSizedValue(int bytesize, BinaryInput reader)
      Reads a value from the stream based on the specified size indicator.
      Constructors in heif.boxes with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Constructor Description
      AuxiliaryTypePropertyBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an AuxiliaryTypePropertyBox from the box header and content.
      Box(BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a Box by reading its header from the specified BinaryInput.
      CleanApertureBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader) 
      ColourInformationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a ColourInformationBox from a parent Box and a byte reader.
      DataEntryBox(Box header, BinaryInput reader) 
      DataInformationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, providing additional information from other contained boxes, specifically dref - Data Reference Box and its nested contained boxes, where further additional information on URL location and name is provided.
      DataReferenceBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader) 
      FileTypeBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a FileTypeBox, parsing its fields from the specified BinaryInput.
      FullBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a FullBox by extending a standard Box header with version and flags data.
      HandlerBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, extending the super class FullBox to provide more specific information about this box.
      ImageMirrorBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to mirror the image either vertically or horizontally about its axis.
      ImageRotationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to retrieve the angle (in anti-clockwise direction) in units of degrees.
      ImageSpatialExtentsProperty(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to gather information both on width and height of the associated image item.
      ItemDataBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, providing additional data of metadata items.
      ItemInfoEntry(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Parses an ItemInfoEntry from the specified reader.
      ItemInformationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Parses the ItemInformationBox from the specified reader.
      ItemLocationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an ItemLocationBox by parsing the provided iloc box data.
      ItemPropertiesBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertiesBox by reading the ipco (property container) and one or more ipma (item-property association) boxes.
      ItemPropertyAssociationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertyAssociationBox object, parsing its structure from the specified BinaryInput.
      ItemPropertyContainerBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertyContainerBox resource by reading sequential boxes.
      ItemReferenceBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs an ItemReferenceBox, reading its references from the specified BinaryInput stream.
      MetaBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a MetaBox, parsing its fields from the specified BinaryInput.
      PixelAspectRatioBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader) 
      PixelInformationBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a PixelInformationBox by parsing the specified box header and its content.
      PrimaryItemBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader)
      Constructs a PrimaryItemBox, reading its fields from the specified BinaryInput parameter.
      SingleItemTypeReferenceBox(Box box, BinaryInput reader, int version)
      Constructs a SingleItemTypeReferenceBox by reading its fields from the specified stream.

    • Uses of BinaryInput in jpg

      Methods in jpg with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      (package private) static JpgSegmentConstants JpgParser.fetchNextSegment(BinaryInput reader)
      Reads the next JPEG segment marker from the input stream.
      private static void JpgDatePatcher.processExifSegment(BinaryOutput writer, BinaryInput reader, int length, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Patches the ASCII date tags and binary GPS time-stamp rationals if they are present within an EXIF segment.
      private static void JpgDatePatcher.processXmpSegment(BinaryOutput writer, BinaryInput reader, int length, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Scans the XMP XML content for date-related tags and overwrites their values.

      Constructor Description
      ChunkHandler(java.nio.file.Path fpath, BinaryInput reader, java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> requiredChunks, boolean strict)
      Constructs a handler to parse filtered chunks from a PNG image file stream.

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private BinaryInput RiffHandler.reader 
      Methods in webp with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private void RiffHandler.parseChunks(BinaryInput reader, long totalChunkSize)
      Iterates through RIFF chunks sequentially and parses bitstream headers.
      private long RiffHandler.readFileHeader(BinaryInput reader)
      Reads and validates the RIFF/WEBP header and determines the exact container size.
      Constructors in webp with parameters of type BinaryInput 
      Constructor Description
      RiffHandler(BinaryInput reader, java.util.EnumSet<WebPChunkType> requiredChunks)
      Constructs a handler to parse selected chunks from a WebP image file stream.
